title: WeBuild – Ownership Attestation (Ownership) – SD-JWT VC payload
description: Schema for the SD-JWT VC payload of an Ownership attestation as defined in the Ownership Rulebook (Chapter 3.2). This models the JSON claims set prior to SD-JWT disclosure/packing. The Ownership records all natural and legal persons holding direct or indirect ownership in a legal entity, providing comprehensive transparency on beneficial ownership structures and economic interests in support of KYC/KYS processes and AML obligations.

vct.description: Verifiable Credential Type. Base type is 'eu.we-build.ownership.1'.

attestation_legal_category.description: The legal category of the attestation as defined by eIDAS 2. For Ownership attestations this SHALL be 'EAA', as the attestation is typically self-issued by the legal entity subject to the ownership disclosure.

issuing_entity.description: The identifier of the legal entity that issued the attestation. For Ownership attestations this is typically the subject entity itself (self-issued EAA).

ownership.description: Array of owner objects (either natural person or legal person). SHALL contain at least one natural person owner to comply with AML requirements that mandate identification of natural persons who ultimately own the entity.

items.description: A single owner, which is either a natural person or a legal person, holding ownership interests.

natural_person.description: Details of a natural person owner.

family_name.description: Last name(s) or surname(s) of the natural person who holds ownership or control. SHALL be a non-empty string.

given_name.description: First name(s), including middle name(s) where applicable, of the natural person who holds ownership or control. SHALL be a non-empty string.

birth_date.description: Day, month, and year of birth of the natural person. SHALL follow ISO 8601 format (YYYY-MM-DD). Optional.

natural_person_identifier.description: Optional identification details for the natural person.

document_type.description: A value defining the type of the identity document according to the nationality of the UBO (e.g., Passport, National identity card, Driver's license). Optional.

document_number.description: The number of the identity document (passport number, national ID number, driver's license number, etc.). Optional.

issuing_country.description: The country that issued the identity document (ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 code). Optional.

residence_address.description: Residence address where the owner currently resides. All sub-fields are optional.

address.description: The street address where the owner currently resides. Optional.

locality.description: The city where the owner currently resides. Optional.

postal_code.description: The postal or ZIP code of the owner's residence address. Optional.

region.description: The state, province, or region of the owner's residence address. Optional.

country.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 country code where the owner currently resides. Optional.

contact_address.description: Contact address where the owner can be contacted, if different from residence address. All sub-fields are optional.

address.description: The street address where the owner can be contacted. Optional.

locality.description: The city where the owner can be contacted. Optional.

postal_code.description: The postal or ZIP code of the owner's contact address. Optional.

region.description: The state, province, or region of the owner's contact address. Optional.

country.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 country code where the owner can be contacted. Optional.

stake.description: Quantitative ownership data and ownership category classification for the natural person owner.

direct_ownership.description: The percentage of direct ownership held by this owner in the subject entity. SHALL be a decimal value between 0.00 and 100.00 (inclusive).

indirect_ownership.description: The percentage of indirect ownership held by this owner through one or more intermediate entities. SHALL be a decimal value between 0.00 and 100.00 (inclusive).

total_ownership.description: The complete percentage of ownership (direct + indirect across all layers). SHALL be a decimal value between 0.00 and 100.00 (inclusive). SHALL be equal to or greater than direct_ownership and equal to or greater than indirect_ownership.

legal_person_id.description: The list of legal entity identifier(s) where this owner holds interests — includes the direct legal entity and all indirect legal entities in the ownership chain (EUID, LEI, DUNS). SHALL contain at least one non-empty string identifier.

ownership_category.description: Classification of the type of ownership or control relationship. SHALL use one of the standardized values defined in Section 2.8.1 of the Ownership Rulebook.
enum: Controller via voting or governance rights

legal_person.description: Details of a legal person (entity) owner.

legal_person_name.description: The complete official name of the legal entity which holds ownership interests in the subject entity. SHALL be a non-empty string.

legal_form_type.description: The legal form of the owning legal entity. SHALL be a non-empty string.

legal_person_identifier.description: The identification of the legal entity which owns this entity (ex. National identification: EUID, TAX or other identification standard :LEI, etc). At least one identifier must be specified.

lei.description: Legal Entity Identifier (LEI) per ISO 17442. Optional.

registered_address.description: Registered address where the legal owner is registered. All sub-fields are optional.

address.description: The street address where the legal owner is registered. Optional.

locality.description: The city where the legal owner is registered. Optional.

postal_code.description: The postal or ZIP code of the legal owner's registered address. Optional.

region.description: State, province, or region of the legal owner's registered address. Optional.

country.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 country code where the legal owner is registered. Optional.

contact_address.description: Contact address where the legal owner can be contacted, if different from registered address. All sub-fields are optional.

address.description: The street address where the legal owner can be contacted. Optional.

locality.description: The city where the legal owner can be contacted. Optional.

postal_code.description: The postal or ZIP code of the legal owner's contact address. Optional.

region.description: State, province, or region of the legal owner's contact address. Optional.

country.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 country code where the legal owner can be contacted. Optional.

stake.description: Quantitative ownership data and ownership category classification for the legal entity owner.

direct_ownership.description: The percentage of direct ownership held by this legal entity owner in the subject entity. SHALL be a decimal value between 0.00 and 100.00 (inclusive).

indirect_ownership.description: The percentage of indirect ownership held by this legal entity owner through one or more intermediate entities. SHALL be a decimal value between 0.00 and 100.00 (inclusive).

total_ownership.description: The complete percentage of ownership (direct + indirect across all layers). SHALL be a decimal value between 0.00 and 100.00 (inclusive). SHALL be equal to or greater than direct_ownership and equal to or greater than indirect_ownership.

legal_person_id.description: The list of legal entity identifier(s) where this owner holds interests — includes the direct legal entity and all indirect legal entities in the ownership chain (EUID, LEI, DUNS). SHALL contain at least one non-empty string identifier.

ownership_category.description: Classification of the type of ownership or control relationship. SHALL use one of the standardized values defined in Section 2.8.1 of the Ownership Rulebook.
enum: Controller via voting or governance rights

evidence.description: List of supporting documentation substantiating the ownership structure calculation (e.g., shareholder register, organizational chart, trust deed). At least one piece of evidence SHALL be present. Evidence MAY be provided as a URI reference or as an embedded base64-encoded document.

items.description: A single piece of supporting evidence for the ownership structure.

evidence_id.description: URI reference to the evidence document (e.g., organizational chart, shareholder register). The organization chart is made available through a dedicated link. If the Relying Party (RP) requires additional information regarding the organizational structure, it may download the relevant document and use it as supporting evidence for the ownership list calculation. SHALL be a non-empty string.

evidence_type.description: Defines the type of the object, which SHALL be 'Evidence'.

evidence_data.description: The actual organizational structure document as a base64-encoded string. This field is required if the `id` does not contain a URI to existing location with the organization structure content is available. Optional.

evidence_confirmation.description: Boolean confirmation that the organizational structure document is current and has been used as the basis for the ownership calculation. Optional.

evidence_date.description: The date when the evidence document was created or last updated. SHALL follow ISO 8601 format (YYYY-MM-DD). Optional.

status.description: Status object per SD-JWT VC status-list mechanism. MUST be present when the technical validity period is greater than 24 hours.

type.description: Status mechanism type. For SD-JWT VC Status List this SHALL be 'status-list'.

status_list_credential.description: URI of the Status List Credential that contains the bitstring indicating revocation status.

status_list_index.description: Zero-based index into the status list bitstring for this credential.

status_purpose.description: Purpose of the status entry. For Ownership attestation this SHALL be 'revocation'.

trust_anchor_url.description: URL at which a machine-readable version of the trust anchor used for verifying the Ownership attestation can be found or looked up. Optional.

schema_version.description: Version of the Ownership attestation schema used. Optional.

cnf.description: Confirmation claims per SD-JWT VC. Holder binding via JWK is recommended.

jwk.description: Public key bound to the holder.
